cleanupPolicy: Generated rerun artifacts under the output roots are deleted after triage; nothing is tracked in git.
blockedReasons: This scenario does not support deterministic reruns; flake handling is unsupported and must be reviewed manually.
boundary: Flake and rerun results are evidence inputs and remain review-gated until triaged. Reruns are bounded reruns with an explicit cleanup policy and disjoint output roots. No auto-fix, no auto-apply, and no quality guarantee. Browser read-only or draft-only.
